steps.title: Set up the percentage formula
steps.content: To find 6% of 450, use the formula: (percentage ÷ 100) × total = number of marbles

steps.title: Calculate 6% of 450
steps.content:
$$\frac{6}{100} \times 450 = \frac{6 \times 450}{100} = \frac{2700}{100} = 27$$
There are 27 marbles in the bin. B is correct.
